objective: maximize the packing-density score of the layout solver
transcript:
=== SESSION LOG — agent a9 — objective: maximize the packing-density score of the layout solver ===
(iterative optimize-eval loop; evals scored by the shared grader; session 26)

--- attempt 1 (commit 637fe12) ---

observation: Important discovery about the harness: the evaluator silently caps runtime at 117 seconds — anything longer gets a truncated score.
observation: Behavior matches the docs. Moving on.

observation: Tried block-diagonal preconditioning this attempt — abandoning it: fp16 underflow corrupted the partial sums.
